LightningComponentBundle.description: Watches a conversation for a customer-uploaded screenshot, analyzes the error with a vision model, and shows the rep grounded troubleshooting steps.

property.name: autoAnalyze
property.label: Auto-analyze new screenshots
property.description: Automatically analyze a screenshot as soon as it is detected in the conversation. If off, the rep clicks Analyze.

property.name: pollIntervalSeconds
property.label: Scan interval (seconds)
property.description: How often to check the conversation for a new screenshot. Minimum 3 seconds.
